Title: PostgreSQL Like a Pro: Migrate with confidence to fast, future-ready PostgreSQL on Azure
Description:
Meet Jonathon Frost, from the PostgreSQL team at Microsoft Azure. Jonathon shares how to modernize your databases with PostgreSQL on Azure, faster and with less friction.

He’ll walk through homogeneous and heterogeneous migrations, including a hands‑on demo of AI‑assisted Oracle‑to‑Postgres migration using VS Code.

0:07 Introduction 0:31 Migrating to managed PostgreSQL on Azure is simpler than you think 0:50 Two types of migrations: homogenous and heterogenous 1:09 Benefits of migration to managed PostgreSQL on Azure 1:29 Benefits with AMD 1:57 Built in migration support 2:39 AI assisted migration tooling in VS Code and with GitHub Copilot 3:01 Demo of a PostgreSQL migration 6:43 Wrap Up

📺 Watch the series: https://www.aka.ms/PostgreLikeAPro 💻 Start your migration journey: https://www.aka.ms/Migrate-to-Postgres
Author: Microsoft Developer
